creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Tue Jul  2 11:49:12 2013
New Revision: 322162
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322162

Log:
  devel/dits: update to 2.2.37
  
  - Update to 2.2.37 [1]
  - Minor name and url fix in pkg-descr [1]
  - Trim Makefile header
  - Remove leading article in COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/180179
  Submitted by:	Greg Becker <greg@codeconcepts.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/dits/Makefile
  head/devel/dits/distinfo
  head/devel/dits/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/dits/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/dits/Makefile	Tue Jul  2 08:17:39 2013	(r322161)
+++ head/devel/dits/Makefile	Tue Jul  2 11:49:12 2013	(r322162)
@@ -1,23 +1,19 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	dits
-# Date created:		5 December 2004
-# Whom:			Greg Becker <greg@codeconcepts.com>
-#
+# Created by: Greg Becker <greg@codeconcepts.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	dits
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.34
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.37
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://codeconcepts.com/
 
 MAINTAINER=	greg@codeconcepts.com
-COMMENT=	A data integrity verifying and disk exercising test suite
+COMMENT=	Data integrity verifying disk exercising test tool
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/dits
-MAN1=	dits.1
+MAN1=		dits.1
 MANCOMPRESSED=	no
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/dits/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/dits/distinfo	Tue Jul  2 08:17:39 2013	(r322161)
+++ head/devel/dits/distinfo	Tue Jul  2 11:49:12 2013	(r322162)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (dits-2.2.34.tar.gz) = 700c1f8deb09c9fd79efd3fdff5f7e2b54fe119070c48bc460b710b070484130
-SIZE (dits-2.2.34.tar.gz) = 127509
+SHA256 (dits-2.2.37.tar.gz) = 1ddfc60211f2fb201d8006b70d0a48fc1742f22c184de54f6463c4f329b3ed84
+SIZE (dits-2.2.37.tar.gz) = 191811

Modified: head/devel/dits/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/dits/pkg-descr	Tue Jul  2 08:17:39 2013	(r322161)
+++ head/devel/dits/pkg-descr	Tue Jul  2 11:49:12 2013	(r322162)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-dits is a tool for validating disk drivers, file systems, and
+Dits is a tool for validating disk drivers, file systems, and
 lock managers.  More than a simple exerciser, dits is able to
 verify that no detectable data integrity errors have occurred.
 
-WWW: http://codeconcepts.com/
+WWW: http://codeconcepts.com
